import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  mut running = true
  mut last_line: Option<String> = None

  while running
    match io.read_line()
    when None
      running = false
    when Some(l)
      let stripped = string.trim(l)
      if not string.is_empty(stripped)
        last_line = Some(l)
      end
    end
  end

  match last_line
  when Some(l)
    print(l)
  when None
    print("(none)")
  end
end
